steps.script: () => { const out=[]; const seen={}; document.querySelectorAll('details').forEach(d=>{ const s=d.querySelector('summary'); const label=(s?s.textContent:'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); if(!label||seen[label]) return; seen[label]=1; const c=d.cloneNode(true); const sm=c.querySelector('summary'); if(sm) sm.remove(); out.push({label:label, text:(c.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().slice(0,950)}); }); return out; }
